title: Progress
description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task, typically displayed as a progress bar.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the Radix UI progress primitive.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the progress component code.

examples.title: Default
Custom Color
examples.description: Progress bar with a custom fill color using the color prop.

examples.title: Custom Height
examples.description: Progress bar with a taller track using the height prop.

examples.title: Custom Speed
examples.description: Progress bar with a slow transition using the speed prop (in ms).

examples.title: Variants
examples.description: Progress bars showcasing different colors, heights, and speeds together.
